results.owner_or_reason: Confirmation/re-affirmation ADR (ratified 2026-07-07) that explicitly makes no change to ADR-0001; closes the D-P1 -> D-S17 -> ADR-0001 lineage rather than introducing new build work. Its restated obligations are already covered by existing stories: polymorphic tenant spine & JIT provisioning (feature-map.txt L299-302), personal->Teams upgrade-pass re-key / OrgUpgrade FR-W13 (L639, L693), polymorphic {user|org} principal on identity+billing (L65-67, L367), and cross-tenant/no-org isolation probes in CI & per-deploy (L365, L515, L638). Arch ids A-TENANCY/A-AUTH/A-CELL are in covers-union per gap-hunt/gaps-HylAAMRbPO.json (gaps: []).
